# Summary

## What changed?

## Why?

## Type of change
- [ ] Lyric/content correction
- [ ] Site/UI bug fix
- [ ] New feature / enhancement
- [ ] Build / tooling / maintenance

## Verification
- [ ] For lyric changes: verified against the printed source (cite details in PR description if helpful)
- [ ] For code changes: `npm run check`
- [ ] For code changes: `npm run build`
